kingdoms.command.faction.help: Kingdoms commands: /f create, invite, join, leave, claim, unclaim, info, map, war. Most actions are also available in the Faction Table interface.
kingdoms.command.faction.invite.received: %s invited you to %s. Use /f join to accept.
kingdoms.command.faction.leave.disbanded: You left — faction %s was disbanded, treasury returned: %s.
kingdoms.command.faction.role.invalid: Unknown role. Use member or officer.
kingdoms.command.faction.leadership.use_: Use /f transfer to change the leader.
kingdoms.command.faction.leadership.rece: You are now the leader of %s.
kingdoms.command.faction.withdraw.max: You can withdraw at most %s at once.

kingdoms.command.faction.map.legend: @ you, # your faction, letter other faction, . unclaimed
